name: Huafa Industrial Co.,Ltd.Zhuhai
summary: Huafa Industrial Co.,Ltd. Zhuhai operates as a real estate company in China. The company develops residential, commercial, tourism, land, and housing properties. It operates under the Hongjing Garden, Huafa New City, Huafa Century City, Huafa Shuijun, and Huasheng State Manor brand names. The company was founded in 1980 and is based in Zhuhai, China.
